differentials.name: 1.  Churg-Strauss syndrome (lobular distribution of peripheral consolidation
differentials.raw: 1.  Churg-Strauss syndrome (lobular distribution of peripheral consolidation

context: ground-glass opacities with crazy paving | subpleural reticulations (less common early, but frequent in later stages of disease) | linear bandlike opacities parallel to pleural surface (> 2 months after onset of symptoms) | pleural effusion (in < 10%)
